disclosure: Original draft cited an unverifiable 'April 2026 policy update' and a fabricated '292M reviews removed' statistic attributed to a nonexistent Google report. Both were replaced with Google's documented, longstanding review-gating and solicitation policy and an honest general pattern about automated enforcement.

claims.text: Google's review policy prohibits review gating (screening customers by sentiment before sending the review link) and instructing customers on what to include in a review
Scripting specific details for customers to mention, such as naming an employee, carries risk under Google's solicitation guidelines
Google's enforcement against policy-violating reviews is automated and removes reviews without prior warning to the business
Sending an open-ended review request by text or email after service, to every customer equally, remains compliant

disclosure: Response time statistics reflect widely cited lead-response research (e.g., Lead Response Management studies), not Black Arrow proprietary data.

claims.text: Only 17% of service businesses respond to new leads within an hour
Responding in under 5 minutes converts at nearly double the rate
Doubling ad budget without fixing response time roughly doubles the number of leads going cold
